channel.title: Prog. Mater. Sci.
channel.description: Filtered papers from Prog. Mater. Sci.

item.title: Metamaterials for Light Generation
item.description:
Publication date: January 2027

Source: Progress in Materials Science, Volume 163

Author(s): Haonan Shi, Ningning Song, Sirui Li, Wei Li, Maxwell Wallace, Zhengwen Yang, Bo Li, Jingbo Sun, Yongzheng Wen, Ji Zhou
